top_signals.title: Critical SimpleHelp flaw exploited to deploy new stealer malware
top_signals.summary: Hackers are exploiting a recently disclosed critical vulnerability (CVE-2026-48558) in SimpleHelp to deploy Djinn Stealer, a previously undocumented cross-platform information stealer targeting Windows, macOS, and Linux. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Comcast jumps 9% after announcing it will spin off NBCUniversal and Sky from cable business
top_signals.summary: Comcast said it will separate into two publicly traded companies through a tax-free spinoff of NBCUniversal and Sky.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Japanese thrift stores set to open dozens of locations from Malaysia to Hong Kong
Midsize Western buyout firms continue Japan push with new offices
Agentic AI Has an Identity Problem and Attackers Know It
top_signals.summary: AI agents can access data, trigger workflows, and take action across enterprise systems. Token Security explains why governing these privileged identities is becoming essential for enterprise security. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
